title: Wedding Day Coverage
description: Full day coverage including ceremony, reception, and couple portraits. High-res edited gallery included.

title: Engagement Session
description: Outdoor or studio session for couples. Includes 2 outfit changes and 20 edited digital images.

title: Corporate Headshots
description: Professional headshots for LinkedIn and company profiles. Studio lighting with neutral background.

title: Newborn Photography
description: In-home or studio session for babies under 2 weeks old. Props and wraps provided.

title: Family Portrait Mini-Session
description: Quick outdoor family photos. Perfect for holiday cards. Includes 5 edited digital images.

title: Event Coverage (Hourly)
description: Birthday parties, anniversaries, or corporate events. Minimum 2 hours booking.

title: Real Estate Photography
description: Interior and exterior shots for residential listings up to 3,000 sq ft.

title: Senior Portrait Package
description: Customized session for high school seniors. Two locations and outfit changes.

title: Product Photography (Small Batch)
description: Up to 15 products shot on white background or lifestyle setting. Ideal for e-commerce.

title: Elopement Package
description: Intimate ceremony coverage for couples eloping. Includes location scouting assistance.
